headline: Built for InsideScale
subheadline: AI-powered sales infrastructure to help scale sales development for B2B SaaS leaders and manage distributed teams across regions

challenges.title: Distributed Team Management
challenges.desc: InsideScale's teams span San Francisco and Mexico, making coordination complex. Rapid growth adds pressure on communication tools. Secure data sharing across borders is essential for client trust.

challenges.title: Scaling Sales Operations
challenges.desc: With 66.7% YoY growth, InsideScale must de-risk GTM for 75+ clients. Handling sales development across regions strains resources. Interim leadership gaps can slow pipeline generation.

challenges.title: Client Data Security
challenges.desc: As a SaaS consulting firm, InsideScale deals with sensitive data from multiple clients. Rapid scaling increases risks of breaches in distributed setups. Maintaining compliance while growing operations is a key concern.

challenges.title: Talent Acquisition
challenges.desc: InsideScale's small team of 12 employees needs market-ready sales talent quickly. Managing remote hiring from San Francisco and Mexico limits options. Integrating new hires into sales functions without disrupting services is challenging.

deliverables.title: Sales Dev AI System
deliverables.desc: Builds automated lead generation and pipeline tools that integrate with existing sales operations to de-risk GTM for 75+ clients

deliverables.title: Data Operations Framework
deliverables.desc: Creates secure data handling systems that connect with distributed teams in San Francisco and Mexico, ensuring compliance and efficient client data management

deliverables.title: Interim Leadership Platform
deliverables.desc: Develops a leadership support structure using AI to fill gaps in sales development, allowing InsideScale to scale faster without hiring delays

deliverables.title: GTM Engineering Tool
deliverables.desc: Constructs a customized GTM system that fast-tracks sales processes and integrates with InsideScale's current workflows for better regional team alignment

engagementSteps.title: Initial Assessment
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review InsideScale's current sales infrastructure and identify key pain points like distributed team challenges.

engagementSteps.title: System Design
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Design AI-powered solutions tailored to sales scaling and data security needs.

engagementSteps.title: Implementation
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Roll out the new systems and integrate them with existing operations for immediate impact.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to automate sales processes like lead generation and data analysis for B2B SaaS firms.

faqItems.question: How does this integrate with our teams?
faqItems.answer: The system connects with your distributed teams in San Francisco and Mexico for seamless collaboration.

faqItems.question: Is our data secure?
faqItems.answer: Yes, we build with strict security measures to handle client data for 75+ companies.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typically 3 months, starting with assessment and ending with full integration.

faqItems.question: What tech stack do you use?
faqItems.answer: We base it on tools like Gong and Clearbit, tailored to your needs.

faqItems.question: Can this scale with our growth?
faqItems.answer: Yes, designed for rapid growth like your 66.7% YoY increase.

stackItems.name: Gong
stackItems.role: Analyzes sales calls to improve development strategies

stackItems.name: Clearbit
stackItems.role: Enriches lead data for better GTM execution

stackItems.name: Front
stackItems.role: Manages team communications across distributed locations

stackItems.name: Semgrep
stackItems.role: Secures code in sales operations for risk-free scaling

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Integrates CRM to track client interactions for 75+ companies
